/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/radxa_converter_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/sshclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/settingsmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/filemanagerdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/batchqueuedialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/profilesdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/ffmpegparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radxa_converter.dir/src/conversionworker.cpp.o -o radxa_converter  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Concurrent.so.5.15.17 -lssh /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.17 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.17
